title: equisetum palustre f. tenue
intro: Equisetum palustre f. tenue, also known as the slender horsetail or marsh horsetail, is a type of perennial herbaceous plant that belongs to the family Equisetaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and diuretic effects, which can help to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and treat urinary tract infections. The health benefits of Equisetum palustre f. tenue include its ability to promote kidney function, support bone health, and act as an antioxidant, which can help to protect the body from oxidative stress and damage. In herbal preparations, the plant is typically used in the form of infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, which can be consumed as teas, taken as capsules or tablets, or applied topically as a cream or salve.
